message:
chore: add min_source_diversity field to ObjectPlacementPolicy and tune rate limiter

fcp-core:
- Add min_source_diversity: u8 field to ObjectPlacementPolicy
  Specifies minimum number of distinct nodes required for reconstruction
  Default 0 means no diversity requirement (backward compatible)

fcp-ratelimit:
- Minor tuning to leaky bucket implementation
  Adjust timing calculations for more consistent rate enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
